name: Chizuru Yoshida
description:
__Height:__ 167 cm

Yoshida Chizuru is another close friend of Sawako. She is the energetic girl of the group.  ~!In Kurumi's fake rumors it was passed around that she was a former Yankee. She is a close childhood friend with Ryuu Sanada, who is also the son of the owner of her favorite ramen shop, they are best friends and they even say brothers, she argues about who is the older. She went to Kazehaya's middle school as well. She has a crush on Ryuu's brother, Tooru. Chizuru is mostly only the slower side of things; she did not realize that Kazehaya liked Sawako (even though she and Ayane planned many events for them) until late in the series, after the 2nd year in their school has started.!~
